page: Microsoft Azure EC64ads_cc_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the ECADCCV5 server family. It is powered by a dedicated AMD EPYC 7763 processor with 32 physical cores and 64 vCPUs, operating at a clock speed of 3.525 GHz. The system is equipped with 512 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8 GB per core. Storage is bundled with a 2458 GB local disk, and the instance is Premium Storage capable. The virtualization layer is managed by the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

Benchmark results indicate strong multi-core capabilities, with stress-ng multi-core and Passmark CPU scores ranking in the top 25%. Memory performance is highly competitive, as evidenced by a top-tier Passmark memory score in the top 10% and strong cached small-block memory bandwidth. However, uncached large-block read and write memory bandwidths fall into the average category. Cryptographic operations perform well, supported by hardware-accelerated AES and SHA instruction sets, though the processor lacks AVX-512 support.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the EC64ads_cc_v5 offers a dense memory profile and substantial local storage without the added expense of GPU hardware. This makes it a resource-dense option for memory-intensive workloads. Tradeoffs include average performance in single-threaded tasks, such as gzip compression and text processing, and a notable performance drop in large-scale LLM text generation, where it ranks in the bottom 25% for 70B model inference.

This server is highly suited for memory-intensive database operations, as demonstrated by its strong Redis SET and Passmark database benchmark results. It is also well-suited for multi-threaded decompression tasks, ray tracing, image processing, and general-purpose enterprise applications that require large memory capacities and fast local storage.
description: Microsoft Azure EC64ads_cc_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine configured with a dedicated 64-vCPU AMD EPYC 7763 processor running at 3.525 GHz, 512 GB of RAM, and a 2458 GB local disk. Operating on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance delivers strong multi-core CPU and database performance, with Passmark memory scores reaching the top 10%. While it lacks AVX-512 support and exhibits average uncached large-block memory bandwidth, its high memory-to-core ratio and built-in local storage provide a cost-effective, resource-dense architecture for memory-bound workloads. It is highly suited for database operations, multi-threaded decompression, and memory-intensive enterprise applications.
og_description: Microsoft Azure EC64ads_cc_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring a 64-vCPU AMD EPYC 7763 processor, 512 GB of RAM, and 2458 GB of local storage, designed for database and memory-intensive workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure EC64ads_cc_v5 features 64 vCPUs, 512 GB RAM, and 2458 GB local storage, optimized for memory-intensive database workloads.
tagline: A high-density memory-optimized instance featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processing and substantial local storage for demanding database workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by a dedicated 64-vCPU AMD EPYC 7763 processor running at 3.525 GHz.
Equipped with 512 GB of RAM and a 2458 GB local storage disk.
Top-tier memory performance with Passmark memory scores in the top 10%.
Strong multi-core CPU and database benchmark performance.
Lacks AVX-512 support and exhibits average large-model LLM inference speeds.
Optimized for memory-intensive databases, multi-threaded decompression, and enterprise applications.
